name: nyxid
description: NyxID skills marketplace — credential broker so agents call downstream APIs (OpenAI, Anthropic, GitHub, Lark, custom APIs, SSH, MCP) without ever seeing raw keys or tokens.

plugins.name: nyxid
plugins.description: Brokers credentials for downstream services through the nyxid CLI so the agent never sees raw API keys or OAuth tokens. Use to connect/add a service, set up an API key, proxy requests, or manage credentials, nodes, MCP, channels and SSH.
